LanguageData.GS_Blade.label: high-frequency blade
LanguageData.GS_Blade.description: A high-frequency blade, fitted with a ultrasonic vibration generator and small energy cell. The vibration generator causes the blade to vibrate rapidly when powered, giving the weapon highly potent armor penetration capabilities. Weapons like these are commonly used by marines and mercenaries.
LanguageData.GS_Blade.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.GS_Blade.tools.1.label: point
LanguageData.GS_Blade.tools.2.label: edge
